activities.title: Let's Count Together!
activities.ariaPrompt: I love counting! Let's count together. Hold up your fingers and let's count to five. Ready? One... two... you say the next one! What comes after two?
followUps: Great! Now let's count to ten! Can you do it?
Look around you — can you count how many things you can see?
Can you count backwards from five? Five... four... you try!

activities.title: More or Less?
activities.ariaPrompt: Here's a fun question: if you had 3 mangoes and your friend had 5 mangoes, who has MORE? Take your time, think about it!
followUps: If you have 7 stones and I have 4 stones, who has less?
Can you think of two groups of things and tell me which group is bigger?
If you had 6 sweets and ate 2, how many would be left?

activities.title: Sharing Fairly
activities.ariaPrompt: You have 4 oranges and you want to share them equally with your friend. How many oranges does each person get? Let's think about it together!
followUps: What if you had 6 oranges and two friends to share with?
When you share something equally, does everyone get the same amount?
Can you think of something you like to share with others?

activities.title: Shapes All Around
activities.ariaPrompt: Shapes are everywhere! A ball is round — it's a circle shape. A door is usually a rectangle. Can you look around right now and find something that is a square?
followUps: Can you find something shaped like a triangle?
How many sides does a square have? Count them!
What shape is the sun? What shape are the clouds?

activities.title: Adding with Fingers
activities.ariaPrompt: Hold up 2 fingers on one hand. Now hold up 3 fingers on the other hand. Count ALL your fingers together — how many is that?
followUps: Now try 4 fingers and 1 finger. How many altogether?
What is 3 + 3? You can use your fingers!
Can you make up your own adding question for me?
